name: Spartans Vs Zombies Defense
short_description: In this tug-of-war, casual defense game， you play Leonidas who is the hero-king of Sparta, against hordes of attacking zombies in Thermopylae. Recruit allies and build defenses to stop them!
detailed_description:
In this tug-of-war, casual defense game， you play Leonidas who is the hero-king of Sparta, against hordes of attacking zombies in Thermopylae. Recruit allies and build defenses to stop them!

● Leonidas actually learned magic, very useful, very powerful, very funny.
● A wide variety of allies to summon including swordsmen, Royal Guards, archers, witches and more.
● More flexible combination of tactics.
● Special supply system.
● 60 waves in classic mode, and after accomplished difficulty will increase.
● 3 kinds of endless mode, wilder, more fun.
● Beautiful graphics, epic battle.
